title: Bright Student Studio Ano Poli: 1-Bed Base

about.summary: Bright student studio Ano Poli located in the Kleious building near City Centre Thessaloniki. This studio is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for beautiful student accommodation.

sections.title: Bright Student Studio Ano Poli Guide
sections.content: This bright studio offers an excellent base for your studies. It features a 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed configuration, making it a very practical private setup. You will find everything needed for everyday living.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has the essentials for student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience the area.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads wanting a bright workspace.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: Situated close to City Centre Thessaloniki, the flat is at the edge of Ano Poli. Groceries and daily tasks are very simple with local shops nearby. Walking to main city attractions is extremely quick.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarkets and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a quick 5-10 minute walk.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Utilities are listed as included; please confirm exact breakdown before publishing. For more details on the city, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable studio. Check out our other Kleious listings.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Bright Student Studio Ano Poli: 1-Bed Base
seo.seo_description: Bright student studio Ano Poli ideal for Erasmus students. This 1-bed base is near Aristotle University, perfect for digital nomads.
